type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: Already implemented with_counts param on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (added after 'default', before closing paren), plus new _GroupTupleWithCount namedtuple after _GroupTuple; please add your case_sensitive param after with_counts in both signatures and merge carefully to avoid clobbering

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: Implemented case_sensitive param on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby: sort/group key uses ignore_case postprocessor when not case_sensitive, then output grouper key is remapped to the raw (original-case) attribute of the first item in each group. Docstring updated with versionchanged 3.1 note. My local copy has no with_counts/_GroupTupleWithCount changes -- looks like we're on separate copies; will finalize my own patch now.
